title: gladiolus teretifolius
intro: Gladiolus teretifolius, also known as the 'Rough-stemmed Gladiolus', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus teretifolius include relief from congestion, fever reduction, and soothing of irritated throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Gladiolus teretifolius can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or used topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
